caption: A man wearing a white t-shirt, blue jeans, and glasses is seen working inside a tent-like structure with a white fabric roof and supporting poles. He is positioned next to two large, stacked equipment cases; the top case is light blue and the bottom case is yellow, both reinforced with metal edges and latches. Throughout the sequence, the man is actively pushing the blue case to shift its position atop the yellow one. In the initial moments, he stands more upright with his hands placed on the side of the blue case. As time progresses, he leans further forward and bends his knees, applying more force to slide the case. The background contains other brown cardboard boxes and a large object covered in black plastic sheeting. No text or logos are legible in the scene.
